---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for PhantomNet
title: "[FEATURE] <Short description>"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## 💡 Feature Summary
Describe the feature you want added.

## 🎯 Problem This Solves
Explain the issue or limitation the feature solves.

## 🛠 Proposed Solution
Describe how you think it should work.

## 📐 Technical Notes (optional)
Any architecture ideas, modules involved, or performance implications.

## 🖼 UI / UX Ideas (if frontend related)
(Optional) Attach sketches or screenshots.

## 🔗 Related Issues
Reference other issues (e.g., #1).
